programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj `breaks up\.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Amy pick their best-man and maid of honour by experimenting on the gang. Meanwhile, Leonard's self-confidence is still badly damaged after reading his brother's Christmas letter.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: A woman who moves into an apartment across the hall from two brilliant but socially awkward physicists shows them how little they know about life outside of the laboratory.

programs.title: The Cheap Seats
programs.desc: Taking a fun look at the week that was are The Cheap Seats hosts Melanie Bracewell and Tim McDonald.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Frasier and Niles encounter bullies from their school days, but both approach the awkward reunion very differently.
